title: CISA Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (UBH bundled sample)

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure contain a command injection vulnerability in web components.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy SSL-VPN Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy contain a heap-based buffer overflow in SSL-VPN.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway contain a buffer overflow allowing session token disclosure (Citrix Bleed).

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect contains a command injection vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco IOS XE Web UI contains a privilege escalation vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: VMware vCenter Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: VMware vCenter Server contains a remote code execution vulnerability in a vSphere Client plugin.
Microsoft Outlook contains a privilege escalation vulnerability allowing NTLM credential theft.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Spring Framework JDK 9+ Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Spring Framework (Spring4Shell) contains a remote code execution vulnerability via data binding.
F5 BIG-IP iControl REST contains a missing authentication vulnerability enabling RCE.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: SonicWall SMA100 Appliances SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SonicWall SMA100 series contains a SQL injection vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Zoho ManageEngine Multiple Products Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Zoho ManageEngine products contain a remote code execution vulnerability via SAML SSO (Apache Santuario).

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 contains a remote code execution vulnerability (Log4Shell).
